baseLayerPolicy: Cinematic raster background with deterministic brand/text overlays; public Shopify packshots are composited after local matte extraction and labels are not redrawn.
notes: Dark green/copper multi-product stack with real Shopify packshots and per-item/bundle price slots.
Black Seed Oil source is cropped to the bottle so the separate non-compliant promo placard is not composited.
Price table, product cluster, CTA, footer, and disclaimer are reflowed to avoid collisions.
Uses approved locked cinematic botanical background plates rather than flat procedural leaf blobs.
secretScan: No credentials, tokens, customer data, or account access material included.
